support.Lotus: Best blessing here: random stacking buffs from time and takedowns snowball when you are ahead, helping you protect allies and lock down enemies.

offlane.Krix: Solid alternative: flat extra maximum health that scales with level keeps you sturdy, worth it when you want to stay durable and apply pressure.

support.Idrisil: Lowest priority for support: bonus physical and magical armor while healthy and off cooldown; take it only if you specifically want that effect.

offlane.Vermis: Best blessing here: every third quick hit on the same hero tears a chunk of their max health, helping you stay durable and apply pressure.
offlane.Krix: Solid alternative: flat extra maximum health that scales with level keeps you sturdy, worth it when you want to stay durable and apply pressure.

offlane.Idrisil: Solid alternative: bonus physical and magical armor while healthy and off cooldown, worth it when you want to stay durable and apply pressure.
offlane.Lotus: Best blessing here: random stacking buffs from time and takedowns snowball when you are ahead, helping you stay durable and apply pressure.
offlane.Nihil: Lowest priority for offlane: Doom on damaged heroes grants stats that permanently grow on level-ups and takedowns; take it only if you specifically want that effect.

midlane.Lotus: Best blessing here: random stacking buffs from time and takedowns snowball when you are ahead, helping you land your burst and roam.
midlane.Aion: Solid alternative: mana regen on casting plus gold from your spell damage, worth it when you want to land your burst and roam.
midlane.Demiurge: Lowest priority for midlane: boosts the stats and damage your items give you; take it only if you specifically want that effect.

support.Lotus: Best blessing here: random stacking buffs from time and takedowns snowball when you are ahead, helping you protect allies and lock down enemies.
support.Exarch: Solid alternative: your heals and shields give the target attack speed and on-hit magic damage.
support.Aion: Lowest priority for support: mana regen on casting plus gold from your spell damage; take it only if you specifically want that effect.

carry.Xyris: Solid alternative: bonus damage that climbs as you rack up kills on units, worth it when you want to scale and deal damage.
carry.Thraex: Lowest priority for carry: marking the hero you last hit makes you deal more and take less from them.
